report.summary: UX audit of Day 42 pages, generated 18 OG images for crypto-cards compare/review pages, fixed timer bug, accessibility violations, and breadcrumb inconsistencies across 4 pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed airdrops CountdownTimer: replaced useMemo (side-effect misuse) with useEffect for proper timer lifecycle cleanup
Added aria-live='polite' and role='timer' to countdown display for screen reader accessibility
Added aria-label attributes to cashback calculator number inputs for screen reader context
Fixed text-[10px] (below 14px minimum) to text-xs on cashback calculator category labels
Added missing Breadcrumb with Home link to airdrops page (was missing navigation entirely)
Fixed breadcrumb on Bybit vs Binance comparison: added Home link, removed self-referencing href on current page
Fixed breadcrumb on Gate.io vs KuCoin comparison: added Home link, removed self-referencing href on current page
Removed unused imports (ChevronDown, CheckCircle, AlertCircle) from airdrops ClientContent

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /airdrops — timer bug fix, breadcrumb added, unused imports cleaned
Crypto-cards compare pages (8 pages) — OG images created
Crypto-cards review pages (10 pages) — OG images created
